next_action: Keep file-backed source-backed memory as the auditable substrate and run a bounded memory/control/eval benchmark repair so source-backed memory behavior is judged by measured repair evidence instead of premature infrastructure.
overclaim_boundary: File-backed memory is not the breakthrough by itself, and a benchmark suite still must not claim lift until the evidence passes the gate.
rationale: The current gap is not a missing vector store; goal 023 shows the assisted prompt-load repair removed the timeout and improved the live suite delta to near-neutral no-lift evidence. The next bounded repair should target source-backed memory/control/eval next-action behavior before adding storage infrastructure.
